content.en:
Ye Tian didn't earn much reincarnation coins in the Reincarnation Heavenly Pavilion, and the Reincarnation Heavenly Pavilion actually didn't care about it, but cheating was not advisable, otherwise it would affect the business of the Reincarnation Heavenly Pavilion.

This is also the reason why Xuduo attaches so much importance to it.

Otherwise, he wouldn't bother to bother with this matter!

"Good!"

Ye Tian agreed to go to the Reincarnation Heavenly Clan's ancestral monument for testing.

His copy body is indeed an awakening cultivation, but it is just a breakthrough of three paths together, plus the cultivation is the supreme other shore origin ancestral body method, this can have such terrifying strength.

Therefore, no matter how he tested it, the cultivation of his copied body was the level of a bloodline awakening.

Soon.

Xuduo left Fengyu City with Ye Tian, the ancestors of the Reincarnation Heavenly Clan were not here, so they naturally had to leave here.

Reincarnation of the Heavenly Clan, reincarnation of the ancient mountain.

This is the base camp of the Reincarnation Celestial Clan, there is no slave race, only the Reincarnation Celestial Clan is eligible to enter here.

This is also the first time Ye Tian has come here.

After coming to the Ancient Mountain of Reincarnation, Ye Tian sensed a lot of terrifying aura, and there were many Origin Upper Realm Overlords who had awakened eight times alone.

These eight-time Awakened Origin Upper Realm Overlords alone could sweep across the entire Eternal Beyond Land.

Reincarnation in front of an attic in the ancient mountain.

Xuduo came here with Ye Tian, and after walking in, he came to a special void.

In this void, there seems to be an infinite vastness, and there is an incomparably huge monument, which is the ancestral monument.

And in the depths of this void, there are three breaths that far surpass the void.

"Definitely the Origin Upper Realm Overlord of the Nine Awakenings!"

Ye Tian guessed.

These three Nine Awakened Origin Upper Realm Overlords are in retreat and cultivation here, but they are definitely not all the Nine Awakened Origin Upper Realm Overlords of the Reincarnation Heavenly Clan.

How many Origin Upper Realm Overlords of the Nine Awakenings there were in the entire Reincarnation Heavenly Clan, he still didn't know, but there were definitely quite a few.

It can be seen that the heritage of the reincarnation celestial clan is too terrifying!

"Ao Chen, let's start testing! In front of the ancestral monument, even I can't hide my cultivation!"

Xuduo said.

"Good!"

Ye Tian followed Xuduo's instructions and used the ancestral tablet to test his cultivation.

To say that he was not nervous at all, it was impossible, after all, he was not a real reincarnation celestial, but the ancestral monument should not be able to detect the copying talent.

Airplanes!!!!!

The ancestral monument shone brightly, and the light enveloped Ye Tian.

Soon.

The test results are in.

【One Awakening】

Seeing this result, Xuduo was shocked, but felt normal.

After all, his cultivation far surpassed Ao Chen, and he also felt that Ao Chen was a bloodline awakening, but his physical strength and origin were not the appearance of a bloodline awakening, so he was suspicious.

But now, Aochen is really just a bloodline awakening.

"Very good, Aochen, come back with me!"

Xuduo left with Ye Tian.

Not long after, Ye Tian returned to the Reincarnation Heavenly Pavilion in Fengyu City and announced the results.

All the members of the Reincarnation Heavenly Clan believe in the ancestral monument, so they naturally believe that Ao Chen did not cheat.

It's just that Aochen is so demonic, they feel very surprised.

Afterwards.

Aochen played a few more matches, and although his opponent was getting stronger and stronger, he still won each time at the cost of serious injuries.

At this time, those members of the Reincarnation Heavenly Clan knew that Ao Chen was deliberately hiding his strength.

The Reincarnation Heavenly Pavilion also knows, so Aochen's odds are not high, and if you want to make a lot of reincarnation Heavenly Coins by relying on the reincarnation Heavenly Pavilion's games, don't think about it.

Of course.

He can continue to challenge the Origin Upper Realm Overlord who has awakened three times.

However, there are very few competitions at this level of the Three Awakenings, and only one will be held for a long time.

The reason why this is so is because there are very few slaves who have awakened three times, and even if they do, they are the right-hand men of some reincarnation celestial clans, and they are of great use and will not be used for competitions.

The first awakening and the second awakening of the slave battle, this is the main force.

"I've also earned a lot of reincarnation coins in these competitions, which can be used to buy a lot of resources, so it's naturally no problem to raise the cultivation of this replica body to the second balance in a short period of time!" Ye Tian muttered.

And after Ye Tian's investigation and understanding, he also knew which resources were of great help to improve his cultivation.

I have to say that the reincarnation celestial clan has too many resources at their disposal, but only the reincarnation celestial clan is qualified to buy them, and other slave races are not qualified to buy those good things.

Yanhai Building.

This is a shop that sells all kinds of resources, and the owner behind it is a very powerful reincarnation celestial.

After Ye Tian came here, he bought a resource called Reincarnation Platinum Liquid, where this resource came from, he didn't know, but only a few shops could buy it, and it had a great effect.

He bought a large amount of reincarnation platinum liquid before returning to his residence.

Subsequently.

He began to practice in retreat, refining these reincarnation platinum liquids.

"The effect is very good, and it can even improve the reincarnation Haotian Origin and the Origin Realm will!"

Ye Tian said excitedly.

Of course.

For him, this reincarnation platinum liquid could improve his strength in an all-round way, but for other reincarnation celestial clans, it was a bit wasteful, and they were only used to improve the bloodline and refine the flesh.

The path of reincarnation of the celestial clan's bloodline awakening is very similar to the first path in the land of eternity.

Therefore, it is really a waste for them to use the reincarnation platinum liquid.

"The effect of the reincarnation platinum liquid is really good, it is estimated that it will take less than a million primeval era years, I can reach the limit of the first balance, and I am qualified to impact the second balance!"

Ye Tian muttered.

After his strength is strong, he can get more good things here, so as to feed back to the real body copy body, so that the real body copy body will become stronger!

Before you know it, a million primeval years have passed.

this day.

Ye Tian's cultivation of the Ao Chen's copy body had already reached the limit of the first balance.

Subsequently.

He began to attack the second balance, and also prepared a lot of three-source secret medicines.

"Break through!"

It was not the first time that Ye Tian had broken through, so he easily broke the shackles.

Rumble!!!!!

His cultivation continued to skyrocket, and his strength increased rapidly.

After a long time, he had already completed the breakthrough and reached the second level of balance, and the bloodline belonging to the reincarnation heavenly clan had also completed the second awakening.

But.

He didn't get the reincarnation supreme divine power this time, but due to the improvement of his strength and the enhancement of his bloodline, he could cast the reincarnation supreme divine power several times, and the power of the reincarnation supreme divine power ruin heavenly spear has also increased a lot.
